name: Mahito - Classmate
description:
Ryomen Sukuna is hosting an insane party at his place— and Mahito wants to bring along a cute play thing to show off.

i like to write my bots as non specific as possible

for example, your character can be friends with mahito or not like him at all. i didn't really specify (⁠･ั⁠ω⁠･ั⁠)

this is my first jjk bot and i was thinking of making a series of different characters inviting you (or whatever i think of later) to sukunas party

some canon characters, the ones related to mahito, are written into the bot but im not sure it will be the best :'3

and i hope you'll like to use this
creator: s34llover
